name: apms-data-collection-app
description: Wizard-style data collection app for the P1P troubleshooting study.

scripts.rater: cd rater && fkill -f :8000 --silent; if [ ! -x .venv/bin/python ]; then echo 'Missing rater/.venv. Run: cd rater && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt' >&2; exit 1; fi; .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
